chooseStep.heading: Edit or create your LinkSet
chooseStep.description: Choose how to edit or create your FAIRiCat LinkSet.
chooseStep.fairiCatIntro: With a FAIRiCat LinkSet repositories can advertise the interoperability affordances (services) they provide.

scratch.title: Start new from scratch
scratch.description: Open an empty editor and create a new LinkSet manually.

import.title: Import a file
import.description: Import an existing LinkSet from upload or URL, then continue editing.

importStep.heading: Import LinkSet
importStep.urlDemoAlert: Demo mode: URL import currently uses fake data and does not fetch remote JSON yet.

editStep.heading: FAIRiCat LinkSet Editor
editStep.anchorDescription: A valid absolute URL (link anchor) is required for each service and its added links.

service.heading: Service {{index}}
service.anchorHelp: Enter the service's base URL; the LinkSet 'anchor' (e.g., https://example.org)

description.label: Description
description.helpText: Provide a machine-readable description of the service

documentation.label: Documentation
documentation.helpText: Provide human-readable information about the service's documentation

metadata.label: Metadata
metadata.helpText: Provide further information about the service

uploadPanel.heading: Upload a FAIRiCat LinkSet JSON file
uploadPanel.dropzoneHelp: Drag and drop a .json file here, or press Enter/Space to browse.
uploadPanel.errorParseFailed: Unable to parse the uploaded JSON file.
uploadPanel.errorReadFailed: Unable to read the file. Ensure it is valid JSON.

previewPanel.heading: Linkset preview; Exchangeable as FAIRiCat Linkset JSON
